title: Slime Activator 100ml | Mix with PVA glue to create slime | Fun learning activity
features: Mix into PVA glue to create slime, Fun science activity for children, Letterbox shaped bottle for easy delivery, Full instructions included, Creates up to 1kg of slime
description: Product Description [NEW] Slime Activator for PVA glue - Create your own slime! Our brand new Slime Activator is the secret ingredient to making your own gooey, stretchy, and colorful slime. Simply follow the instructions, mixing it with PVA glue, and watch the magic happen! Key Features: Easy to Use: Just add our activator to your PVA glue for instant slime. Versatile: Create a variety of slime textures and consistencies by adjusting the ratio of activator to glue. Customizable: Add your favorite colours, glitter, or other texturing agents to personalize your slime. Educational: Learn about the science behind slime as you experiment with different ingredients. Sensory Exploration: Slime is a fantastic tool for sensory exploration, helping to develop fine motor skills and tactile awareness. Safe and Non-Toxic: Our products are made with child-safe materials, ensuring a fun and safe experience. Letterbox sized bottle: Quick, no fuss, delivery to your home. Slime making instructions Step 1: Pour your PVA glue Pour your PVA glue into a mixing bowl. The PVA does not expand or shrink so how much you pour out will be how much slime you end up with. Note: Not all PVA glue works in slime making. Please check reviews or purchase craft PVA glue and avoid contractor's or industrial PVA. Step 2: Shake the activator bottle This is important to spread out the ingredients in the activator so as not to over or under activate the slime. Step 3: Add activator little by little Add a little at a time until the PVA starts to form into 'blobs'. It will not look like slime yet, but will start to clump together. Use the spoon to mix the PVA and activator together. If you have food colouring you would like to add then this is the best time to add it - just a drop at a time. This is also the best time to add foam if you would like a more airy texture. Step 4: Knead the mixture into slime This step is very important. The heat from your hands will help the slime change from a sticky, gloopy mixture into a bouncy, stretchy, slime. Have patience and keep kneading. You can add a little more activator at this stage if necessary. Step 5: Store slime in an airtight container In order to preserve your slime you need to avoid drying it out. Keep it in an airtight container while not in use. When you get the slime after being in the container a while it will need a bit more kneading to get it back to its best.
